# Reproduces the user's scene: curved boundary with drive-lines
# creating radial wedges. The arc should get stalls backed against
# it via the offset_carriers path (same as straight walls get).

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0) arc=-1.0
(200,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,200), area 40000

drive-line partitions
(-50,50)
(350,50)
----
drive-line (-50,50) -> (350,50) partitions

drive-line partitions
(-50,150)
(350,150)
----
drive-line (-50,150) -> (350,150) partitions

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 76
faces: 6 (boundary: 1, interior: 5)
graph: 34 vertices, 53 edges (perimeter: 22, interior: 31)
regions: 3
